name: Prince Xie Lian
description: The darling of the heavens was beloved by everyone who had laid their eyes on him. Xie Lian's heavenly beauty, selfless character and mastery over sword caused thousands after thousands of people to be entranced only after a single sight of him. Who would have believed that the Crown Prince was completely hopeless at courting the one who charmed his heart?
creator: _YINGYING_
